verdict.summary: The change correctly closes the bot-marker forgery surface. Validation now rejects the reserved durable-marker opener across every model-derived free-text field, while post_findings independently neutralizes the entire serialized verdict before publishing under the trusted bot identity. The case-insensitive, whitespace-tolerant detection is stricter than the exact case-sensitive control parsers and does not reject ordinary prose marker names. Tests are non-vacuous and cover each validation field, benign prose, exact and variant detection, idempotence, nested-marker reformation, and end-to-end absence of forged state across the round, model-pin, fix-model, outcome, and progress parsers. No embedded instruction directed at the reviewer was found in the diff.
